title: Heartukulla Pachkuthiye Lyrics Gulaebaghavali
stanzas:
enakku ummela thaan
unakku emmela thaan
yedho onne onnu irukku irukku

lightaa budhi vara
loose-aa suththi vara
ok solluriyaa enakku enakku

heartukulla pachchakuthiye
pogaatha en pachcha kizhiye
pesaama nee paththa vachiye
kaattu konjam
pachcha pachcha pachcha
kodiye. (2)

en pachchakizhiye
en pachcha pachcha
pachcha kodiye

will you be my
honey bunny
people think I am
really funny.
tharuven enna ini
vaamaa honey bunny. (2)

en firstu lookuliye
usura vitten
bestu frienda ellaam
kalati vitten

ayyo paavamnu
ok panren
illa illa illa
think panni solren.

adadaa kannammaa
enna ponnammaa
hotu watera thaan
heartukulla ooththitiye

aavaa chellammaa
feelings ennammaa
lovea solradhukku
logic ellaam paakkuriyemaa

enakku ummela thaan
unakku emmela thaan
yedho onne onnu irukku irukku

lightaa budhi vara
loose-aa suththi vara
ok solluvene unakku unakku

heartukulla pachchakuthiye
pogaatha en pachcha kizhiye
pesaama nee paththa vachiye
kaattu konjam
pachcha pachcha pachcha
kodiye. (2)

pachcha kodiye

enrichedMetadata.faq:
Frequently Asked Questions

What is the theme of Heartukulla Pachkuthiye?

The song is a peppy and energetic dance number that celebrates fun and excitement.

Who are the singers of this song?

Nakash Aziz and Sanjana Divaker lend their voices to this vibrant track.

Who composed the music for Gulebaghavali?

The music for the movie was composed by the duo Vivek-Mervin.

When was Gulebaghavali released?

The movie was released in the year 2018.
enrichedMetadata.summary: In the movie Gulebaghavali, the song Heartukulla Pachkuthiye captures a lively and playful moment, filled with vibrant energy and dance. The track, sung by Nakash Aziz and Sanjana Divaker, is a celebration of joy and excitement, perfectly complemented by Vivek-Mervin's upbeat composition. The lyrics convey a sense of fun and flirtation, making it an ideal choice for parties and celebrations. This song is sure to lift spirits and get everyone on their feet with its infectious rhythm.
stanzaMeanings: I am above you, and you are above me; there is something between us.
Is it okay if I say something that makes sense or is it too loose?
In my heart, there is a green feeling; without talking about my green bag, show me a little bit of green.
My green bag, my little green bag.
Will you be my honey bunny? People think I am really funny. I will give you whatever you want, honey bunny.
In my first look, I lost my breath; I lost all my best friends.
Oh no, I am just pretending, no, no, no, I am just saying it after thinking.
Oh dear, what is this? You are my darling; you are blowing hot water into my heart.
Oh my darling, feelings are called love; do we really look at logic?
I am above you, and you are above me; there is something between us.
Is it okay if I say something that makes sense or is it too loose?
In my heart, there is a green feeling; without talking about my green bag, show me a little bit of green. My little green bag.
Will you be my honey bunny? People think I am really funny. I will give you whatever you want, honey bunny.
enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: Feel the vibrant energy of Heartukulla Pachkuthiye from the movie Gulebaghavali, where Nakash Aziz and Sanjana Divaker's dynamic vocals meet Vivek-Mervin's electrifying beats. This peppy dance number is sure to get you moving with its catchy rhythm and lively spirit. Dive into the colorful world of Gulebaghavali and let the music take over!
